name: Bear Bolster Dog Bed - Boots & Barkley™ XL
description:
Your furry friend will stay super cozy with the Wow Bear Bolster Dog Bed from Boots & Barkley™. This brown dog bed features a bear face with ears, nose and eyes for an adorable look. Showcasing a plush 90% recycled poly-fiber construction, this bolster dog bed is designed for extra-large breeds and features a machine-washable cover for easy maintenance.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
